final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese infographic illustration of 中国少数民族服饰, structured as a 文博图鉴 exploded-view reference plate.

Style/medium: needs a 国家博物馆展板 / 历史服饰图鉴 aesthetic — exact illustration technique and rendering finish are yours
Composition: must follow this fixed layout:
  顶部: 中文主标题 + 副标题 + 导语
  左侧: 结构拆解区，中文引线标注关键部件，配局部特写
  右上: 材质 / 工艺 / 质感区，展示真实纹理小样并附说明
  右中: 纹样 / 色彩 / 寓意区，展示主色板、纹样样本和文化解释
  底部: 穿着顺序 / 构成流程图 + 核心特征总结
Subject: must include a full-body standing figure (真实人物全身站姿) wearing a complete 中国少数民族服饰 ensemble as the central subject — specific ethnic group, garment system, key components, construction details, and craft techniques are yours to determine based on visual richness and structural complexity
Scene/backdrop: must be a paper-texture background in 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 tones
Lighting/mood: needs a neutral, archival-documentation atmosphere — exact light direction is yours
Color palette: needs a restrained, scholarly direction anchored by the paper background — exact accent colors and ethnic palette are yours
Materials/textures: needs authentic material differentiation — exact rendering of fabric weave, embroidery texture, metalwork sheen, and dye gradients is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all annotation text in 简体中文 — including: 主标题、副标题、导语、结构引线标注、材质说明、纹样寓意说明、色彩含义说明、核心特征总结; all characters must be legible, correctly written simplified Chinese — no romanization, no English, no garbled characters
Constraints: must preserve complete layout structure across all 5 zones; all in-image text must be 简体中文 simplified Chinese only; figure must be full-body standing; annotations must use clean leader lines connecting to labeled parts; material swatches and color palette must be visually distinct sample blocks with accompanying text
Avoid: 海报感、影楼感、电商感、动漫感、cosplay感; over-decoration; incorrect stroke characters; blurred or illegible text; false material rendering; misaligned annotation lines; English or pinyin text
